lifecycleScripts.afterStart: bash -c 'wp user get compat_editor >/dev/null 2>&1 || wp user create compat_editor compat-editor@example.com --role=editor --user_pass=password; if wp role exists shop_manager >/dev/null 2>&1; then wp user get compat_shop_manager >/dev/null 2>&1 || wp user create compat_shop_manager compat-shop@example.com --role=shop_manager --user_pass=password; else echo "shop_manager role absent — WooCommerce not active yet"; fi'
